description: Google Drive Sync — PR Review Bug Fixes. Critical correctness fixes, reliability improvements, and UX polish from Copilot review of PR #1.

userStories.title: Fix LastModified deserialization for legacy entries
userStories.description: As a developer, I need legacy diary entries to deserialize with default(DateTime) for LastModified so the backfill migration correctly detects and fixes them.
acceptanceCriteria: DiaryEntry.LastModified property has no initializer (remove '= DateTime.UtcNow')
DiaryService.AddAsync() still explicitly sets LastModified = DateTime.UtcNow before saving
Entries deserialized from LocalStorage that lack a LastModified field get default(DateTime) (0001-01-01)
BackfillLastModifiedIfNeeded in DiaryService detects default(DateTime) and backfills from Timestamp.ToUniversalTime()
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Use ETag instead of Version for Drive concurrency control
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Google Drive service to use etag for the If-Match header because Drive's If-Match expects an ETag, not a version number.
acceptanceCriteria: FindSyncFileAsync requests fields=files(id,etag) instead of fields=files(id,version)
Upload URLs use fields=id,etag instead of fields=id,version
FileResponse model uses [JsonPropertyName("etag")] on a property named ETag
IGoogleDriveService return tuples use ETag instead of Version
SyncService.PerformSyncAsync passes etag to upload calls
If-Match header in UpdateFileAsync uses the etag value
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix tombstone purge not persisting changes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the merge engine to set LocalChanged and RemoteChanged when tombstones are purged so the purge actually gets saved and uploaded.
acceptanceCriteria: MergeEngine.Merge captures the count returned by RemoveAll for tombstone purge
If purgedCount > 0, both localChanged and remoteChanged are set to true
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Guarantee OnDataChanged re-subscription after ReplaceAllAsync
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the sync service to re-subscribe to OnDataChanged even if ReplaceAllAsync throws, so auto-sync never silently stops.
acceptanceCriteria: PerformSyncAsync wraps the unsubscribe/ReplaceAllAsync/resubscribe in try/finally
The finally block always executes _diaryService.OnDataChanged += OnDataChanged
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix CancellationTokenSource leak in debounce
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the debounce handler to dispose the previous CancellationTokenSource to prevent resource leaks from repeated edits.
acceptanceCriteria: OnDataChanged stores a reference to the previous CTS before canceling
Previous CTS is disposed after canceling and before creating the replacement
New CTS is created and token captured after disposal
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Distinguish offline errors from real HTTP failures
userStories.description: As a user, I want real sync errors (403, 429, 500) to show as errors instead of being silently swallowed as offline.
acceptanceCriteria: SyncAsync catches HttpRequestException and checks ex.StatusCode
When StatusCode is null (network/offline failure), sync skips silently and reverts to previous state
When StatusCode has a value (e.g. 403, 429, 500), SyncStatus is set to Error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Lazy-initialize Google Auth to prevent race conditions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need GoogleAuthService to lazily initialize so sign-in works from any call site without depending on layout initialization order.
acceptanceCriteria: GoogleAuthService has a private bool _initialized flag (default false)
InitializeAsync sets _initialized = true after calling JS initialize and is idempotent (skips if already initialized)
A private EnsureInitializedAsync method calls InitializeAsync if _initialized is false
SignInAsync, IsSignedInAsync, and GetAccessTokenAsync all call EnsureInitializedAsync before their JS interop calls
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Set auth header per-request instead of on shared HttpClient
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Google Drive service to set Authorization on individual requests to prevent the Bearer token from leaking to non-Drive requests.
acceptanceCriteria: SetAuthHeaderAsync is replaced with a GetAuthTokenAsync method that returns the token string
GetAuthTokenAsync throws InvalidOperationException if token is null or empty
FindSyncFileAsync uses HttpRequestMessage + SendAsync instead of GetAsync, with Authorization header on the request
DownloadSyncFileAsync uses HttpRequestMessage + SendAsync instead of GetAsync, with Authorization header on the request
CreateFileAsync sets Authorization header on the HttpRequestMessage (new request message for POST)
UpdateFileAsync already uses HttpRequestMessage — add Authorization header on it
_httpClient.DefaultRequestHeaders.Authorization is never set anywhere
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Sign-out updates sync status in app bar
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app bar sync icon to immediately show Not Signed In after I sign out instead of staying green.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings.razor OnSignOutClick calls SyncService.SyncAsync() after GoogleAuthService.SignOutAsync()
SyncAsync detects not-signed-in and sets SyncStatus to NotSignedIn
App bar sync icon changes to grey CloudOff after sign-out
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Apply spin animation to syncing icon
userStories.description: As a user, I want the sync icon to spin while syncing so I can see something is happening.
acceptanceCriteria: The sync MudIconButton in MainLayout gets a conditional CSS class (e.g. 'sync-spinning') when SyncStatus == Syncing
The existing spin keyframes in MainLayout.razor.css are applied via that class selector
The icon stops spinning when sync completes or errors
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Show actual error details in sync error snackbar
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see what went wrong when sync fails instead of a generic message.
acceptanceCriteria: ISyncService has a string? LastError property
SyncService captures ex.Message in catch blocks and stores it in LastError
LastError is cleared (set to null) at the start of each SyncAsync call
MainLayout error snackbar displays SyncService.LastError when available, falling back to generic message if null
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
